Renamed CLI identity to wk

Renamed CLI identity to wk

Home / Devlog
Devlog

What happened

Changed package identity to @thjodann/wk, added wk as the primary binary while keeping wikiwiki as a compatibility alias, updated Commander help, spin command hints, README examples, tests, and generated-page command guidance, and preserved .wikiwiki and wiki paths.
